chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-251 0f 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orers ٥n officg objections For hearing of CMA No.1U50/z0z4 For hearing of main Ca5٤ 25-04-2024.
